sys_script_client.description:
When the user selects Acknowledgement as the tasker type the suspense date should be set to 3 days from the moment of the task creation. 2.8.1 | 2022-10-17 |raj | STRY0127550 - Tech Debt - Task Types are used in code with hard coded values, modify to use a new value field in the table
2.8 | 2022-08-16 - raj - DFCT0011108 - Tasker Schedule: "# of Days added to today to set the Suspense Date for Acknowledgment Tasker Type" does NOT follow system schedule on the QUICK TASKING
sys_script_client.name: Task - OnChange Suspense Acknowledgement
